channel.title: EULA on Remko's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in EULA on Remko's Blog

item.title: Get Rid of the Office 2019 Licensing Nag Screen
item.description:
In my lab I have deployed Office 2019 to an Windows 2019 VM to do some testing with Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops.

The proper way to do this is to customize the Office installation using the Office Deployment Tool (ODT). The page even lists an example containing a value to accept the EULA.

item.title: Packaging an application – Auto Accept the EULA
item.description:
Yesterday I was packaging an application called Kluwer Juridische Bibliotheek. When the user first starts this application a screen with the License Conditions pops up and it must be accepted:

I always try to remove such things as I don’t think it’s necessary for every user to accept it.
